# Example Entity With Dangling Reference

As mentioned above, this mechanism works by computing weighted sums over input representations. The transformer, as discussed previously, introduced this idea to replace recurrent networks. Building on the previous discussion, we can see that attention scores are computed using dot products between queries and keys, then normalized with softmax. See above for more details on how the scaling factor is applied.
